title: .NET Day Bangalore
summary: Co-hosted .NET Day Bangalore at Microsoft's Bangalore office, bringing together developers passionate about the .NET ecosystem. The event featured sessions by industry leaders covering the latest advancements in .NET development and Azure integration.
highlights: Co-hosted the event at Microsoft Bangalore office as part of the Azure Developer Community
Featured expert sessions by Nish Anil and Aditya Oberai on .NET development
Facilitated networking between Azure Developer leads and the Bangalore tech community
Brought together .NET enthusiasts for a full day of learning and collaboration

title: AZ-104: Microsoft Azure Administrator Bootcamp
summary: Mentored participants through the 45-day AZ-104: Microsoft Azure Administrator bootcamp, a collaboration between Azure Developer Community and Reskilll. The program empowered students with hands-on Azure skills covering identity management, networking, storage, VMs, and cloud security.
highlights: Delivered mentorship across a 45-day structured learning program for AZ-104 certification
Covered Azure subscription management, virtual networking, storage solutions, and VM scaling
Provided Microsoft Azure Portal passes and exam vouchers to enable real-world practice
Collaborated with Azure Developer Community and Reskilll to reach students across India

title: Azure AI Engineer Associate Bootcamp (AI-102)
summary: Led sessions in the Azure AI Engineer Associate Bootcamp (AI-102), a 6-week virtual program supported by Microsoft Azure and the Azure Developer Community. Participants gained hands-on experience building AI solutions with Azure Cognitive Services and Azure OpenAI.
highlights: Delivered technical sessions across a 6-week bootcamp from October to November
Covered Azure Cognitive Services, OpenAI integration, and responsible AI practices
Guided participants through real-world AI problem-solving scenarios on Azure
Prepared learners for the AI-102: Azure AI Engineer Associate certification exam

title: Azure AI/ML Day
summary: Spoke at Azure AI/ML Day hosted at the Microsoft Bangalore office, sharing practical insights on Azure AI and Machine Learning services. The event united community members and industry practitioners to explore the evolving Azure AI landscape through sessions and live demonstrations.
highlights: Delivered a technical session on Azure AI and ML services at Microsoft Bangalore
Engaged with Azure Developer Community members and practitioners from across Bangalore
Facilitated knowledge sharing between engineers, architects, and AI enthusiasts
Explored real-world use cases leveraging Azure Machine Learning and Cognitive Services

title: Azure Developer Day — Bengaluru (MSA CIT Chapter)
summary: Delivered a comprehensive session on Cloud Computing and Microsoft Azure at the Azure Developer Day hosted by the MSA CIT Chapter in Bengaluru. The talk covered cloud fundamentals, Azure core services, and included a live demo — sparking strong engagement from students and aspiring cloud professionals.
highlights: Delivered a session covering cloud fundamentals to Azure core services with a live demo

Inspired students to pursue cloud careers through a structured Azure learning roadmap

title: Azure DevOps Day
summary: Co-organized Azure DevOps Day at Microsoft Ferns Bangalore office, drawing 120+ community members for a Saturday of hands-on learning. The event featured sessions on CI/CD pipelines, Azure DevOps best practices, and cloud-native workflows delivered by expert speakers.
highlights: Co-organized the event at Microsoft Ferns Bangalore, attracting 120+ attendees on a weekend
Coordinated expert speakers covering CI/CD pipelines, Azure DevOps boards, and cloud workflows

Demonstrated Azure DevOps capabilities through live pipeline creation and management demos

title: Azure Networking Fundamentals — Community Session
summary: Delivered a community session on Azure Networking, covering virtual network fundamentals, subnets, security groups, and networking best practices on Azure. The session marked a return to active community contributions and was hosted through the Azure Developer Community platform.
highlights: Delivered a focused session on Azure Networking fundamentals for community practitioners
Covered virtual networks, NSGs, load balancers, and Azure DNS essentials
Shared best practices for designing secure and scalable network architectures on Azure
Reconnected with the Azure Developer Community after a brief hiatus from public speaking

Completed a multi-level AI curriculum as part of Microsoft's largest AI upskilling initiative
